urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: Two US troops killed and one missing after Iranian attack in Jordan
latest.summary: The US Central Command reported that four US service members were medically evacuated to hospitals in Jordan. The US death toll in the conflict has now risen to 16, following the declaration of an American Navy pilot as dead.
latest.details: The US Central Command reported that four US service members were medically evacuated to hospitals in Jordan. The US death toll in the conflict has now risen to 16, following the declaration of an American Navy pilot as dead. The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps claimed responsibility for destroying at least two US fighter aircraft at Al-Azraq base in Jordan. The US Department of State has advised Americans in the region to monitor news for developments due to heightened tensions.
latest.full_brief: The US Central Command reported that four US service members were medically evacuated to hospitals in Jordan. The US death toll in the conflict has now risen to 16, following the declaration of an American Navy pilot as dead. The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps claimed responsibility for destroying at least two US fighter aircraft at Al-Azraq base in Jordan. The US Department of State has advised Americans in the region to monitor news for developments due to heightened tensions.

latest.title: ANU accused of ‘hysterical’ response to students using AI to cheat as unis scramble to ‘secure’…
latest.summary: The Australian National University (ANU) is attempting to address the widespread use of AI by students. A consultation paper has been released, offering options for classifying assessments as either 'secure' or 'insecure'.
latest.details: The Australian National University (ANU) is attempting to address the widespread use of AI by students. A consultation paper has been released, offering options for classifying assessments as either 'secure' or 'insecure'. Some academics have criticized the university's response as panicked and lacking adequate consultation. The 2025 Australian Digital Inclusion Index indicated that 78.9% of secondary and tertiary students are using generative AI.
latest.full_brief: The Australian National University (ANU) is attempting to address the widespread use of AI by students. A consultation paper has been released, offering options for classifying assessments as either 'secure' or 'insecure'. Some academics have criticized the university's response as panicked and lacking adequate consultation. The 2025 Australian Digital Inclusion Index indicated that 78.9% of secondary and tertiary students are using generative AI.

latest.title: Hungary's president agrees to stand down after parliament backs removal
latest.summary: Hungarian President Tamás Sulyok has agreed to resign after signing a constitutional amendment. The amendment was pushed through parliament by Prime Minister Péter Magyar's Tisza party, which views Sulyok as a loyalist of the former government.
latest.details: Hungarian President Tamás Sulyok has agreed to resign after signing a constitutional amendment. The amendment was pushed through parliament by Prime Minister Péter Magyar's Tisza party, which views Sulyok as a loyalist of the former government. Sulyok accused the government of violating the rule of law and described the amendment as a breaking point in Hungarian constitutional democracy. The Tisza party has implemented significant constitutional changes since their victory in April.
latest.full_brief: Hungarian President Tamás Sulyok has agreed to resign after signing a constitutional amendment. The amendment was pushed through parliament by Prime Minister Péter Magyar's Tisza party, which views Sulyok as a loyalist of the former government. Sulyok accused the government of violating the rule of law and described the amendment as a breaking point in Hungarian constitutional democracy. The Tisza party has implemented significant constitutional changes since their victory in April.

latest.title: Flash flood warnings strike north-east US amid wildfire smoke from Canada
latest.summary: Flash flood warnings have been issued across the northeastern US due to severe thunderstorms and smoke from Canadian wildfires. New York City has experienced unhealthy air quality levels as smoke returned on Saturday.
latest.details: Flash flood warnings have been issued across the northeastern US due to severe thunderstorms and smoke from Canadian wildfires. New York City has experienced unhealthy air quality levels as smoke returned on Saturday. The National Weather Service has placed much of the tri-state area under a level 3 risk for severe storms. In Texas, major rivers are being monitored for potential flooding after a week of heavy rainfall.
latest.full_brief: Flash flood warnings have been issued across the northeastern US due to severe thunderstorms and smoke from Canadian wildfires. New York City has experienced unhealthy air quality levels as smoke returned on Saturday. The National Weather Service has placed much of the tri-state area under a level 3 risk for severe storms. In Texas, major rivers are being monitored for potential flooding after a week of heavy rainfall.

latest.title: German politician resigns over surrogacy child controversy
latest.summary: German politician Jens Spahn has resigned as parliamentary group leader following criticism over his use of a surrogate mother. Surrogacy is illegal in Germany, but raising a child born to a surrogate abroad is permitted.
latest.details: German politician Jens Spahn has resigned as parliamentary group leader following criticism over his use of a surrogate mother. Surrogacy is illegal in Germany, but raising a child born to a surrogate abroad is permitted. Chancellor Friedrich Merz supported Spahn's decision, emphasizing the importance of credibility in politics. The CDU reaffirmed its support for the surrogacy ban earlier this year, and Spahn had previously rejected calls to relax the ban.
latest.full_brief: German politician Jens Spahn has resigned as parliamentary group leader following criticism over his use of a surrogate mother. Surrogacy is illegal in Germany, but raising a child born to a surrogate abroad is permitted. Chancellor Friedrich Merz supported Spahn's decision, emphasizing the importance of credibility in politics. The CDU reaffirmed its support for the surrogacy ban earlier this year, and Spahn had previously rejected calls to relax the ban.

latest.title: Dave Eggers told OpenAI staff that ChatGPT was ‘silencing an entire generation’
latest.summary: Dave Eggers spoke to OpenAI staff about the negative impact of ChatGPT on education. He claimed that the tool has made teachers' lives significantly more challenging.
latest.details: Dave Eggers spoke to OpenAI staff about the negative impact of ChatGPT on education. He claimed that the tool has made teachers' lives significantly more challenging. Eggers expressed concern that students using ChatGPT to write would lose their ability to express their own voices. He described this phenomenon as silencing an entire generation or two.
latest.full_brief: Dave Eggers spoke to OpenAI staff about the negative impact of ChatGPT on education. He claimed that the tool has made teachers' lives significantly more challenging. Eggers expressed concern that students using ChatGPT to write would lose their ability to express their own voices. He described this phenomenon as silencing an entire generation or two.

latest.title: Toronto, New York and Washington top list of most polluted cities as wildfires burn
latest.summary: Cities in north-eastern Canada and the US are experiencing severe air quality issues due to wildfires. Toronto, New York, and Washington DC have recorded some of the worst air quality levels globally, prompting health warnings.
latest.details: Cities in north-eastern Canada and the US are experiencing severe air quality issues due to wildfires. Toronto, New York, and Washington DC have recorded some of the worst air quality levels globally, prompting health warnings. The wildfires have led to evacuations and significant destruction, particularly in the Namaygoosisagagun First Nation. Canadian officials reported that fire activity in Ontario is beginning to ease, but the situation remains critical.
latest.full_brief: Cities in north-eastern Canada and the US are experiencing severe air quality issues due to wildfires. Toronto, New York, and Washington DC have recorded some of the worst air quality levels globally, prompting health warnings. The wildfires have led to evacuations and significant destruction, particularly in the Namaygoosisagagun First Nation. Canadian officials reported that fire activity in Ontario is beginning to ease, but the situation remains critical.

latest.title: ‘It’s only going to get worse’: wildfires forcing firefighters to make impossible choices
latest.summary: Firefighters are increasingly facing difficult decisions as wildfires become more intense and widespread due to climate change. The situation has led to operational challenges, with firefighters needing to prioritize which blazes to combat.
latest.details: Firefighters are increasingly facing difficult decisions as wildfires become more intense and widespread due to climate change. The situation has led to operational challenges, with firefighters needing to prioritize which blazes to combat. Recent wildfires in western Europe have resulted in record-breaking destruction and numerous fatalities. Smoke from Canadian wildfires has also impacted air quality in cities like Toronto, making it the most polluted city in the world at one point.
latest.full_brief: Firefighters are increasingly facing difficult decisions as wildfires become more intense and widespread due to climate change. The situation has led to operational challenges, with firefighters needing to prioritize which blazes to combat. Recent wildfires in western Europe have resulted in record-breaking destruction and numerous fatalities. Smoke from Canadian wildfires has also impacted air quality in cities like Toronto, making it the most polluted city in the world at one point.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.

same_story_dedupe.rule: One underlying event gets one homepage card, even if multiple publishers cover it with different links.
